chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No. 709 of 2003 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No. 3085/19. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 15907/17. ------------------ 10.02.2021 Mr. Zaidullah, Advocate for plaintiff in Suit No. 709 of 2003 and for defendant in Suit No. 1723/2014. ------------------ 1&2. None is present for the defendant No. 1. Same was the position on last date of hearing. It appears that after filing these applications, the defendant No.1 has lost his interest in pursuing them; therefore, the same are dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Athar Zai
